variations.title: Basic
variations.html:
<svg class="pf-v6-c-spinner" role="progressbar" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-label="Loading...">
  <circle class="pf-v6-c-spinner__path" cx="50" cy="50" r="45" fill="none"></circle>
</svg>

variations.html:

snippets.title: Inline size
snippets.html:
Heading

Duis volutpat rhoncus massa, quis convallis nisl.

Second level

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nam velit diam, condimentum dapibus lobortis vitae, suscipit sodales eros. Nulla pellentesque quam ut faucibus faucibus. Sed ac fringilla eros. Ut ut volutpat nisi.

Sometimes you need small text
